notes: Core mechanics work well with ship movement, shooting, asteroid splitting, UFO, and particles, but bullet-asteroid collision has a splice-during-iteration bug that can cause missed hits or errors, UFO score is added after nulling the reference, and the thrust flame rendering is geometrically awkward.
Solid implementation with good vector graphics and audio, but suffers from classic array mutation bugs during collision loops and a newline rendering issue in canvas text.

Solid playable Asteroids clone with waves, splitting rocks, lives, and UFOs, but it has notable polish/logic issues like unsafe array splicing during iteration, title text rendering problems, and some non-classic control/UI shortcomings.
